testcase.name: test_user_me_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_priority_fixes.py:176: in test_user_me_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get user data: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get user data: {"detail":"User not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_open_games_list
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_priority_fixes.py:295: in test_open_games_list assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get open games: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get open games: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
